# Summary / Resumo

Describe the goal of this PR and the problem it solves.

Descreva o objetivo desta PR e o problema que ela resolve.

## Change Type / Tipo de mudanca

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] chore
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs

## Scope / Escopo

- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Security / Seguranca
- [ ] Docs / Documentacao

## Validation / Validacao

- [ ] Lint passed / Lint passou
- [ ] Unit tests passed / Testes unitarios passaram
- [ ] Coverage was reviewed when applicable / Cobertura foi revisada quando aplicavel
- [ ] OpenAPI or contract updates were handled when applicable / OpenAPI ou contratos foram atualizados quando aplicavel
- [ ] Docs were updated for public behavior changes / A documentacao foi atualizada para mudancas publicas

## Security Checklist / Checklist de seguranca

- [ ] No secrets or credentials were added / Nenhum segredo ou credencial foi adicionado
- [ ] Dependency changes were reviewed / Mudancas de dependencia foram revisadas
- [ ] Sensitive local data was not committed / Dados locais sensiveis nao foram commitados

## Evidence / Evidencias

Include relevant logs, screenshots, or workflow links.

Inclua logs, screenshots ou links de workflows relevantes.

## Risk and Rollback / Risco e rollback

- Main risk / Risco principal:
- Rollback plan / Plano de rollback:
